title: Funky Crumbly Portuguese Anchovy Ceviche
description: An adventurous, tamasic-friendly take on traditional ceviche, featuring crumbly anchovy fillets and a touch of Portuguese flair. Perfect for adventurous diners looking to spice up their mealtime routine.
instructions: Combine dehydrated anchovy fillets, lime juice, capers, and crushed red pepper in a bowl
Mix well to combine, ensuring anchovy fillets are evenly coated with lime juice and spices
Drizzle olive oil over the top, stirring to combine
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld
Just before serving, garnish with chopped fresh parsley and season with salt to taste
Serve immediately, allowing guests to spoon the ceviche onto toasted bread or crackers for a satisfying snack
Note: Anchovy fillets should be dehydrated to an internal temperature of 160°F (71°C) to ensure food safety.
Note: Ceviche should be refrigerated at 40°F (4°C) or below for at least 30 minutes to prevent bacterial growth.
